title: Hiring Store Manager at The Coffee Bean India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at The Coffee Bean India
jsonLd.description:
The Coffee Bean India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About The Coffee Bean India:
The Coffee Bean India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Coffee Bean India!
